name: AoE Lab — Cone / Line / Cube shapes + shove-into-spikes (D-AOE-1)
description: Bench for true AoE geometry. Vesper the Geometer (your only hero — drive her) carries the shape spells. LINE (Lightning Bolt): aim straight east down row 9 at the three Line Cultists — the bolt is now a 5-ft-wide LINE, so it zaps the row but spares the Flanker sitting four rows up (a sphere would have caught him too). CONE (Cone of Cold / Burning Hands): aim down-right at the huddled Cone Cluster — the blast is a widening wedge from Vesper, not a circle; sweep the aim and watch the hex preview fan out. CUBE (Thunderwave): a 15-ft cube originating from Vesper — the preview is a boxy patch, not a ring. SHOVE-INTO-SPIKES (the folded-in forced-movement payoff): drop Spike Growth on the open lane east of the Shove Dummy, then Thunderwave the Dummy — the failed CON save pushes it 10 ft east THROUGH the spikes, and it takes 2d4 per 5 ft travelled (no save) on top of the thunder damage. The AoE preview shows exactly which hexes each shape will hit before you click.
